description: Listing of open source software for energy and climate, with both scraper and app-based search engine implementations
name: oss4climate
readme: Listing of open-source for climate and energy applications   TLDR; if you're just looking for the search engine  you will find it here What is the vision of this project  is it just yet another listing?   The vision is that this project should provide a list of open-source software for energy and climate applications  which also provides insight on the following aspects  which are key to the success of open-source usage:     maintenance   security
